title: stelis duquei
intro: Stelis duquei, also known as Duque's stelis, is a species of orchid in the genus Stelis, which is a type of flowering plant native to South America. This orchid is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stelis duquei include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever and infections, as well as promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Stelis duquei can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
